name: Mara Vey
background: A field agent of the Ashen Censure, the Holy Remnant's quiet office for hunting and burning blasphemous Host-cults along the ash roads. Years of it now: find the cell, end it, bury whoever the Censure sent with you last time, move on. No one thanks a cult-breaker, and the cults never stop coming. Lately there are more of them than there should be, and no one in the Office will say why.
